enabled.description: Enable or disable the message forwarder

forward_rules.hint: Configure multiple forwarding rules for different Discord bot instances. Click 'Add' to create a new rule.

default_rule.name: Forwarding Rule
default_rule.hint: Configure a Discord message forwarding rule

platform_id.hint: The Discord platform ID in AstrBot (e.g., 'discord', 'discord-b')

source_channel_id.hint: The Discord channel ID to forward messages FROM

destination_channel_id.hint: The Discord channel ID to forward messages TO

forward_text.hint: Include text content from forwarded messages

forward_files.hint: Include file attachments (MP4, PDF, etc.) from forwarded messages

include_sender_info.hint: Add sender name and ID to forwarded messages

ignore_bot_messages.hint: Skip forwarding messages sent by Discord bots

enabled.hint: Toggle this specific forwarding rule on/off

forward_from_platform_id.description: [Legacy] Discord platform ID to forward from
forward_from_platform_id.hint: [Legacy] Use 'forward_rules' instead. The Discord platform ID to forward messages FROM.

source_channel_id.hint: [Legacy] Use 'forward_rules' instead. The Discord channel ID to forward messages FROM.

destination_channel_id.hint: [Legacy] Use 'forward_rules' instead. The Discord channel ID to forward messages TO.

forward_images.hint: [Legacy] Use 'forward_rules' instead. Include images from forwarded messages

forward_text.hint: [Legacy] Use 'forward_rules' instead. Include text content from forwarded messages

forward_files.hint: [Legacy] Use 'forward_rules' instead. Include file attachments from forwarded messages

include_sender_info.hint: [Legacy] Use 'forward_rules' instead. Add sender name and ID to forwarded messages

ignore_bot_messages.hint: [Legacy] Use 'forward_rules' instead. Skip forwarding messages sent by Discord bots
